texts.text: You did not enter the required confirmation text for deleting your account. Please double check your entry and try again.
You have successfully deleted your account. Thank you for using Academically.
Are you sure you want to delete your account? Once deleted, you will not be able to retrieve your account or history. Please type CONFIRM to delete your account.
Upload your introductory video. Click or drag a file here.
There was no offer made by {0} for {1}. Please select a tutur that has submitted an offer for this project.
Understanding the type of work you're looking for helps us ask all the right questions.
Next, tell us what level you're working at
Understanding the type of work you're looking for helps us ask all the right questions.
Next, tell us what level you're working at
Understanding the type of services you're looking for help us ask all the right questions.
Your time zone was successfully updated.
I agree to the terms & conditions
I agree to the privacy policy
Use the wizard to find academic support

You are a student who's aced their course, a sold professional tutor or academic. You are a student who's aced their course, a sold professional tutor. You are a student who's aced their coursea sold professional tutor
A student named {0} has completed his application to become a tutor.

You have completed your tutor application process.

Your application will now undergo our verification process.

We will send you an email once your application has been approved, rejected or if we have follow up questions regarding some of the information you provided.

Thank you for choosing our platform.
I understand that payment is made to me [X] days after a session has ended and that payment may be withheld should a student raise a complaint against me.
I understand that ScholarPro is not responsible for any claims brought against me by another party as a result of misconduct.
I agree to allow ScholarPro to randomly audit sessions and messages to ensure compliance with their acceptable use policy.
I understand that my ratings effect my ranking in the ScholarPro search results.
I understand that a session must be confirmed by both parties before it can go ahead.
I agree not to include any personal contact information, hyperlinks or branding on my profile as to direct students away from the ScholarPro platform.
I understand that I am solely responsible for paying tax owed on money I earned through the ScholarPro platform.
I agree never to take payment directly from a student and understand that all payments must go through ScholarPro payment gateway.
I agree that if I need to cancel or rearrange a session, I must do so via the ScholarPro booking system.
I agree that all sessions must be booked and delivered via the ScholarPro platform.
Please click all of the checkboxes below to confirm that you agree to all of the declarations.
I have agreed to the DBS update service and I give Academically consent to perform a status check.
In order to be able to serve under 18’s then you must provide a valid DBS or equivalent certificate.

Your phone number was already verified perviously. You will be asked to verify your new phone number again and your previously verified phone number will be removed from our network. Are you sure you want to continue?
You are applying to become a tutor. You will be asked both your personal and professional information. Are you sure you want to continue?
Even when you set your profile to public, you need to connect your account to stripe in order for others to be able to search you on the Academically network.
You were successfully onboarded to stripe!
You will be onboarded to stripe. Are you sure you want to continue?
What other language do you speak?
Are you sure you want to leave the tutor wizard? You can still continue your becoming a tutor process later. Please save your changes before leaving this page.
The subject you are trying to suggest already exists.

You have submitted a subject suggestion with the following details:


Subject Name: {0}

Service: {1}


We regret to inform you that your suggestion was rejected by our Administrators. Please review the details of your submission then try suggesting the subject again.

You have submitted a subject suggestion with the following details:


Subject Name: {0}

Service: {1}


We are happy to inform you that your suggestion was accepted by our Administrators. The subject will now be available on all users across Academically.
If your desired subject is not available, you can suggest a new subject by clicking the Suggest button.
The subject suggestion was submitted. It will now undergo our verification process. We will notify you by email once your suggestion was accepted or rejected.
The suggested subject was approved and will be visible to all users.

A request to add a new Service Subject was created.

The details of the request are:


Subject Name: {0}

Level: {1}

Requested By: {2}


To review this suggestion, make sure you are currently logged in on Acamidemically as an Admin or Super Admin and click this link: Review Suggested Subject


If for some reason the link is not clickable, please copy and paste the url below to your browser:

{3}

• Minimum of 8 character
  • Maximum of 32 character
  • At least one uppercase letter
  • At least one lowercase letter
  • At least one number
  • At least one special character
To create a new password, you have to meet all of the following requirements:
Enter your previous and new password
Two Factor Security using Authenticator App is enabled. If you have a new device or need to reset please disable then re-enable Two Factor Security.
Follow the following steps to set up your authenticator:
Two-factor authentication adds an additional layer of security to your account by requiring more than just a password to log in.
This will disable the Two Factor Security on your account. Are you sure you want to proceed?
Two factor authentication is now disabled.
Two factor authentication is now enabled.
Verification Code is not recognised. Please try again.
Making your tutor profile visible means that you are available to accept work will appear in search results.
Making your student profile visible means that Tutors will be able to view your profile.
Your passport verification has been declined. Please upload a new passport photo.
Your passport was successfully uploaded. It will be subjected to our verification process. We will let you know once it has been approved or declined.
Drop file or click here to upload

The percentage of positive reviews is calculated using the formula:
Positives / (Positives + Negatives)
Your phone number was successfully verified.
The verification code you entered is invalid. Please enter the code sent to your phone number or you can request to send a new one.
The verification code was sent to your phone number.

Hello {0},

You have authorized student {1} and Tutorial request access has been granted

Kind regards,

Academically

Hello {0},

You have been authorized by your guardian {1} and Tutorial request access has been granted

Kind regards,

Academically
Student must be authorized by their parent/guardian befor submitting offer

Hi {0},

We’ve recently received a request from {1} to use our Academic Support Services.

Because of {1}'s age we require authorisation from a parent or guardian before they can interact with another user on the site.

If you are happy for {1} to use our services, please kindly click on the following link to grant them access.

LINK HERE

Kind regards,

Academically
We will send an email to your parents/guardian once this is confirmed you will have full access to the site
You must get authorisation from your parent or guardian before using this service
Unable to suggest a new item under this Area of Study.

A request to book a session was confirmed.

The details of the request are:


Session: {0}

Start Date/Time: {1}

Duration: {2}

Timezone: {3}

Kind regards,

Academically

Your request to book a session has been confirmed by (Tutor) Name: {0}

The details of your request are:


Start Date/Time: {1}

Duration: {2}

Timezone: {3}

Kind regards,

Academically

A request to book a session was created.

The details of the request are:


Session: {0}

Start Date/Time: {1}

Duration: {2}

Timezone: {3}

Link: {4}

Kind regards,

Academically

Your request to book a session was sent and is being reviewed by (Tutor) Name: {0}

The details of your request are:


Start Date/Time: {1}

Duration: {2}

Timezone: {3}

Kind regards,

Academically
Academically - Area Of Study Request Sent

Your request to add a new Area of Study was sent and is being reviewed by our administrators.

The details of your requests are:


Name: {0}

Notes: {1}

Parent Area of Study: {2}
Academically - Area Of Study Request Received

A request to add a new Area of Study was created.

The details of the request are:


Name: {0}

Notes: {1}

Parent Service: {2}

Requested By: {3}
The booking of tutor is successful.
Tutorial request has already been booked with the same tutor

Hello {0},

Please see the following project that maybe of interest to you:


{1}


Proposal: Proposal link

If for some reason the link is not clickable, please copy and paste the url below to your browser:


{2}


Kind regards,

Academically

text.name: PasswordResetLinkExpiredDomainError
text.value: The password reset link has expired. Please request a new password reset link.

texts.text: The password reset link does not exist. Please request a new password reset link.

We received your request to reset your password.

Please click this link reset your password: Password reset link


If for some reason the link is not clickable, please copy and paste the url below to your browser:


{0}

text.name: PasswordResetEmailSent
text.value: A password reset email has been sent to your email account, please check your junk/spam folders.

text.name: PasswordResetEmailDomainErrorMessage
text.value: The user associated with the email address does not exist.

texts.text: Enter your email to get a password reset link.

A request to add a new Support Service was created.

The details of the request are:


Name: {0}

Comments: {1}

Parent Service: {2}

Requested By: {3}

Your request to add a new Support Service was sent and is being reviewed by our administrators.

The details of your requests are:


Name: {0}

Comments: {1}

Parent Service: {2}

A request to add a new Research Method was created.

The details of the request are:


Name: {0}

Comments: {1}

Parent Method: {2}

Requested By: {3}

Your request to add a new Research Method was sent and is being reviewed by our administrators.

The details of your requests are:


Name: {0}

Comments: {1}

Parent Method: {2}

Hello {0}


Please see the following offer that maybe of interest to you

Complete offer link


Regards

Academically
Please set your address on Edit Profile page first.
City or Post Code you entered does not exist.
The support services you selected has not been saved yet. If you leave, your changes will be lost.
The research methods you selected has not been saved yet. If you leave, your changes will be lost.
The research fields you selected has not been saved yet. If you leave, your changes will be lost.
The areas of study you selected has not been saved yet. If you leave, your changes will be lost.
The Area of Study was removed.
The Areas of Study were added.
Your changes on Prfoile Details tab were not yet saved. If you leave, your changes will be lost.
You have unsaved changes! If you leave, your changes will be lost.
The file size should not exceed the limit of {0}.
The file with extension {0} is not not allowed.
Level 1 (GCSE - grades 1,2,3 or G,F,E,D or equivalent)
Level 2 (GCSE - grades 6,7,8,9 or C,B,A,A* or equivalent)
Level 1 (GCSE - grades 1,2,3 or G,F,E,D or equivalent)
Level 2 (GCSE - grades 6,7,8,9 or C,B,A,A* or equivalent)
Area of study levels was updated successfully.
What do you need to help with?
This will be used to match you with the most suitable tutor
What level of support do you require?
What are the main topic areas or keywords?
We have detected the following skills to suit your project. Feel Free to modify these choices to best suit your needs
What are your main concerns or questions you'd like addressed?
You tutor will use this to assess whether they can help you
To use an authenticator app go through the following steps:
2FA is enabled, uncheck to disable, if you have a new device or need to reset then uncheck and recheck the checkbox.
The registration completion link has expired. Please register again to request a new link.
The registration completion link you are trying to access does not exist.

We received your request to register on our site.

Please click this link to complete your registration: Complete registration link


If for some reason the link is not clickable, please copy and paste the url below to your browser:


{0}
A registration completion link has been sent to your email account, please check your junk/spam folders.
Form is not valid. Please check and fix errors.
Tenant name can not be empty
There is no tenant defined with name {0}
User {0} is not active and can not log in. Please contact our support {1}.
Your email address is not confirmed. You can not login.
The user account has been locked out. Please try again later.
Tenant name must be at least 2 chars, starts with a letter and continue with letter, number, dash or underscore.
Can be empty to login as host.
Your account is waiting to be activated by system admin.
Please select one of the following tenants.
Please don't enter an email address for username.
Leave empty to switch to the host
Your email address should be activated
Could not complete login operation. Please try again later.
Are you sure want to delete {0}?
Passwords must be at least 8 characters, contain a lowercase, uppercase, and number
Role {0} will be deleted and unassigned from all assigned users.
Please enter no more than {0} characters
2. Copy this random password so you can send it to the user
Are you sure you want to leave the service wizard?
Offer a free 15 minute interview to allow students to ask questions and help them decide if you meet their requirements.

Hi {0},


You have received an offer for {1}

Please click this link to view the offer details: Offer details link


If for some reason the link is not clickable, please copy and paste the url below to your browser:


{2}
By accepting a session, under our terms and coditions, you are obliged to attend it unless you rearrange it at least 24 hours before the session is due to start, otherwise its non-refundable.
Please indicate that you accept our terms and conditions by toggling the switch to the right.
You can view our Terms & Conditions
